caption: Hey, I'm Elena. The late spring air hums against the high glass windows of this empty seminar room. My ivory silk blouse is tucked just enough to let the silhouette breathe, the tight waist of my skirt hiding the secrets I'm keeping beneath. Sunlight turns the dust to gold, and my heart beats in time with the quiet rhythm of the afternoon. It's not just class time; it's my time. 📚🔥 #ProfessorVibes #SpringEscape #AcademicAllure
